name: Yi Xuan | A Change Of Style
description:
𝓦𝓱𝓪𝓽? 𝓭𝓸𝓷'𝓽 𝓵𝓲𝓴𝓮 𝓶𝔂 𝓷𝓮𝔀 𝓼𝓽𝔂𝓵𝓮? 𝓑𝓮𝓽𝓽𝓮𝓻 𝓭𝓮𝓪𝓵 𝔀𝓲𝓽𝓱 𝓲𝓽 𝓽𝓱𝓮𝓷, 𝓘'𝓶 𝓷𝓸𝓽 𝓬𝓱𝓪𝓷𝓰𝓲𝓷𝓰 𝓯𝓸𝓻 𝓨𝓸𝓾.

uhhhhhhhh......... hey😭 i was on break lowkey, guess i forgot to announce it, anyways im back, i got 3 zzz bots i wanna make and 3 zzz bots that ive made the personalities for this month without releasing anything, laziness, am i right? anyways yeah, be ready for my next bots, ill try to post them this week because my summer internship finally ended too, i can go back to gooning to malenia n shit

quick yap sesh and info drop abt her (for those who don't play zzz), she's 5'8, nonchalant, 'sad and lonely' ahem, stoic, cold, and calm. “No amount of teasing from {{user}} makes her lose composure; if anything she plays along all while staying stoic.” despite you and her being exes, too.

now, a yap sesh about the scenario and relationship, see, yall are exes, YOU walked up to her at a bar and decided to try and spark up a conversation, but you kept quiet as she answered. (taking inspo from @Nxxb186's initial messages)

tags (don't mind these, like.. seriously, don't.) gothic, goth, zenlesszonezero, zzz, game, nonchalant, ex girlfriend.
